name: Tomatoes with Balsamic Vinaigrette
recipeIngredient: Whisk together 2 tablespoons olive oil, 1 tablespoon balsamic vinegar, and a pinch of salt and pepper.
recipeInstructions:
1. Drizzle the olive oil mixture over the sliced tomatoes.
2. Sprinkle coarsely chopped fresh basil or coriander on top.
3. Serve with grilled chicken or fish.
4. Serves 4.
